text.title: vector-db-setup-dev Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vector-db-setup-dev as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Calling recreate_collection unconditionally on every agent run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Drops existing data silently. Always check collection existence and skip creation if already present.

failure-mode.description: Using Chroma in-memory for anything beyond single-session prototyping.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Data is lost on process exit. Use PersistentClient or migrate to Qdrant/pgvector once the pipeline is past initial exploration.
